DevvStream ( (DEVS) ) has issued an update.

DevvStream Corp. will present its strategy and recent business developments to investors at the online Emerging Growth Conference on January 21, 2026, in a live session that includes a moderated Q&A and will later be accessible via archived webcast. data.title: Endeavour Silver Files Indenture for US$350 Million 0.25% Convertible Notes Due 2031
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Endeavour Silver ( (TSE:EDR) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On January 15, 2026, Endeavour Silver Corp. filed a Form 6-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission reporting that it had executed an indenture dated December 4, 2025, with Computershare Trust Company, N.A. as trustee, governing a US$350 million issuance of 0.25% Convertible Senior Notes due 2031. The filing formalizes the terms under which the notes were created, including conversion, redemption, default and other covenant provisions, underscoring Endeavour Silver’s continued use of U.S. debt capital markets and adding a sizable, low-coupon convertible financing instrument to its capital structure, with potential implications for future leverage and shareholder dilution if the notes are converted into equity.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:EDR) stock is a Hold with a C$16.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Endeavour Silver stock, see the TSE:EDR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:EDR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:EDR is a Neutral.

Endeavour Silver’s overall stock score reflects strong technical indicators and positive corporate events, offset by financial performance challenges and a difficult valuation environment. The company’s strategic initiatives and production growth are promising, but profitability and cash flow issues remain significant concerns.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:EDR stock, click here.

More about Endeavour Silver

Endeavour Silver Corp. is a Vancouver-based precious metals producer focused on the exploration, development and operation of silver and gold mines, primarily in the Americas. The company is listed in the United States as a foreign private issuer and reports under the Form 40-F regime, reflecting its cross-border investor base and access to U.S. capital markets.

data.title: Oriental Rise Regains Nasdaq Minimum Bid Price Compliance
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Oriental Rise Holdings Ltd. ( (ORIS) ) has issued an announcement.

On January 15, 2026, Oriental Rise Holdings Limited announced it had regained compliance with Nasdaq’s minimum bid price requirement after its ordinary shares closed at or above US$1.00 for ten consecutive trading days from December 30, 2025 through January 14, 2026, resolving a deficiency first flagged by Nasdaq on June 30, 2025. The restored compliance secures the company’s continued listing on the Nasdaq Capital Market and is positioned by management as a reinforcement of its corporate governance standards, removing an overhang that had posed potential delisting risk for shareholders and stabilizing its standing in U.S. capital markets.

More about Oriental Rise Holdings Ltd.

Oriental Rise Holdings Limited is an integrated tea supplier in mainland China, producing primarily processed and refined white and black tea. The company operates vertically integrated operations from tea cultivation through processing to sales, serving both tea business operators such as wholesale distributors and end-user retail customers, with tea gardens located in Zherong County, Ningde City, Fujian Province.

Average Trading Volume: 541,030

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.72M

Golden Age Exploration Ltd. ( (TSE:GDN) ) has shared an announcement.

Golden Age Exploration Ltd. has announced a non-brokered private placement of up to 5,000,000 units at $0.05 per unit, for gross proceeds of up to $250,000, with each unit comprising one common share and a transferable warrant exercisable at $0.065 for two years. data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

An update from Lakeland Financial ( (LKFN) ) is now available.

On January 15, 2026, Lakeland Financial Corporation announced that Donald J. Robinson-Gay was promoted to Executive Vice President and Chief Credit Officer of both the company and its subsidiary, Lake City Bank, effective January 14, 2026. Robinson-Gay, who has led Lake City Bank’s credit division since 2023 and previously held a series of senior credit and commercial banking roles within the bank and at institutions including M&I Bank and BMO Harris Bank, will oversee management of the loan portfolio, credit quality and policies, and play a key role on key risk and loan committees; his appointment, supported by a Change in Control Agreement, underscores the bank’s emphasis on disciplined credit oversight and sustainable loan growth as it balances risk management with continued expansion in its Indiana markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (LKFN) stock is a Hold with a $62.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Lakeland Financial stock, see the LKFN Stock Forecast page.

Valuation is supportive with a moderate P/E and attractive dividend yield, while the main drag is technical weakness (below major moving averages with negative MACD and subdued momentum).

Lake City Bank, the single bank subsidiary of Lakeland Financial Corporation, is a $6.9 billion community bank headquartered in Warsaw, Indiana, founded in 1872. data.title: Banco Santander-Chile Posts Strong 2025 Results With CLP 1.07 Trillion Net Income
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Banco Santander Chile ( (BSAC) ) is now available.

Banco Santander-Chile reported consolidated financial information as of December 31, 2025, filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on January 15, 2026, showing total assets of CLP 68.1 trillion, driven mainly by CLP 39.6 trillion in net loans to customers and banks, CLP 9.8 trillion in financial instruments, and CLP 11.1 trillion in derivative contracts. On the funding side, the bank reported CLP 14.1 trillion in demand deposits, CLP 16.5 trillion in time deposits, and CLP 10.3 trillion in issued debt and regulatory capital instruments, with total equity of CLP 4.8 trillion, of which CLP 4.7 trillion was attributable to shareholders. For the period ended December 2025, the bank generated net interest income of CLP 2.02 trillion and net fee and commission income of CLP 596 billion, with total operating income of CLP 2.88 trillion; after provisions for loan losses of CLP 573 billion, support expenses of CLP 936 billion and other negative results, income before tax reached CLP 1.28 trillion and net income CLP 1.07 trillion, mostly attributable to equity holders of the bank. The figures indicate solid profitability and a sizeable balance sheet, underscoring Banco Santander-Chile’s strong competitive position and capital base within the Chilean banking sector, while providing investors and other stakeholders with an updated snapshot of asset quality, earnings generation and funding structure at year-end 2025.

The most recent analyst rating on (BSAC) stock is a Hold with a $36.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Banco Santander Chile stock, see the BSAC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BSAC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BSAC is a Neutral.

Banco Santander Chile’s overall stock score is driven by strong earnings call insights and positive technical indicators. While the financial performance shows robust profitability, challenges with revenue growth and leverage are concerns. The valuation is fair, and the dividend yield is attractive. Political and economic uncertainties are notable risks.

To see Spark’s full report on BSAC stock, click here.

More about Banco Santander Chile

Banco Santander-Chile is a leading Chilean commercial bank that operates across retail, commercial and corporate banking, offering loans, deposit products, and a wide range of financial services to individuals and businesses in the Chilean market. It is part of the global Santander group and plays a significant role in the country’s financial system through its extensive loan portfolio, deposit base and capital markets activities.

Average Trading Volume: 291,135

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $15.56B

Find detailed analytics on BSAC stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Southern Petrochemical Industries Corporation Limited ( (IN:SPIC) ) has shared an announcement.

Southern Petrochemical Industries Corporation Limited has disclosed that its statutory auditor, M S K A & Associates, Chartered Accountants, has converted into a Limited Liability Partnership (LLP) under the Limited Liability Partnership Act, 2008, and will now operate as M S K A & Associates LLP, Chartered Accountants, effective 13 January 2026. Following this conversion, the firm’s registration number has been updated, and SPIC has formally notified the stock exchange in compliance with SEBI’s disclosure norms, signalling an administrative change in its audit arrangements without indicating any alteration in the auditor relationship itself.

More about Southern Petrochemical Industries Corporation Limited

Southern Petrochemical Industries Corporation Limited (SPIC) is an Indian company listed on the National Stock Exchange, operating in the petrochemicals and related industrial sectors. The company is subject to securities regulations governing listed entities, including disclosure requirements under SEBI’s Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements Regulations, 2015.

data.title: Total Metals Options High-Grade Menary Gold Project in Ontario’s Rainy River District
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Total Metals ( (TSE:TT) ) has shared an announcement.

Total Metals Corp. has secured an option to acquire 100% of the Menary Gold Project near Kenora, Ontario, a high-grade property that directly borders the Rainy River land package now controlled by Coeur Mining following its multibillion-dollar acquisition of New Gold. Historical work on Menary has returned bonanza-grade results, including grab samples up to 8,120 g/t gold, channel samples of 243 g/t gold over 1 metre, and a drill intercept of 16.99 g/t gold over 6.3 metres, underscoring the project’s exploration potential. Under the option terms, Total Metals will pay a total of $1.01 million in cash and issue $1.01 million in shares over four years, earning full ownership subject to a 4.5% net smelter royalty, pending TSX Venture Exchange approval. Strategically located with year-round road access in what is emerging as a premier North American gold district, the Menary acquisition could significantly enhance Total Metals’ exploration pipeline and district-scale exposure alongside a major industry player.

More about Total Metals

Total Metals Corp. is a Toronto-based mineral exploration company focused on precious metals, with its shares listed on the TSX Venture Exchange, OTCQB and Frankfurt. The company is building a portfolio of high-grade gold assets in established Canadian mining camps, positioning itself within proven districts alongside major producers to leverage existing infrastructure and demonstrated geological potential.

Average Trading Volume: 138,439

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$38.59M

See more insights into TT stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
